description: Nine-run relational compression scan on the no-distance edge-graph control branch. The projected-transverse packet family is used only to seed the initial active support; all later steps are generated by combinatorial survivor refinement under adjacency, graph-shell, or PASS-constrained alternating congruence updates.
architecture_notice: This branch keeps graph size, representative seeds, and the projected-transverse edge support fixed, but replaces the packet-evolution law with a purely combinatorial survivor-refinement preorder on the line graph.
baseline_notice: C0.5 is a no-distance compression probe, not a new transport atlas. Initial packet support only seeds the active edge set. The step count is the defect-ledger compression depth, and PASS separation is active only in the alternating branch.

base_seed_reference.selection_note: same frozen packet family and representative seeds used in C0.1-C0.4

resolution_policy.followup_gate: Promote only if the PASS-constrained alternating branch opens a reproducible arrow step or if obstruction-rank stabilization separates representatives cleanly.

compression_modes.label: Adjacency preorder
compression_modes.definition: Refine behavioral-congruence classes using adjacency signatures only; survivor support is the set of non-singleton adjacency classes.

compression_modes.label: Graph-shell preorder
compression_modes.definition: Refine behavioral-congruence classes using graph-shell signatures only; survivor support is the set of non-singleton shell classes.

compression_modes.label: Alternating PASS preorder
compression_modes.definition: At each step choose the adjacency or graph-shell refinement that reduces non-functoriality most, while PASS forbids merges of previously distinct survivor classes.

representatives.notes: strongest composite anchor carried into the compression branch
corridor surrogate carried into the compression branch
symmetric triad carried into the compression branch

runs.notes: Adjacency preorder on the clustered composite anchor.
Adjacency preorder on the counter-propagating corridor.
Adjacency preorder on the phase-ordered symmetric triad.
Graph-shell preorder on the clustered composite anchor.
Graph-shell preorder on the counter-propagating corridor.
Graph-shell preorder on the phase-ordered symmetric triad.
PASS-constrained alternating preorder on the clustered composite anchor.
PASS-constrained alternating preorder on the counter-propagating corridor.
PASS-constrained alternating preorder on the phase-ordered symmetric triad.
